prompt:
You are an independent result-to-claim reviewer for D5H-Exec. Do not edit files. Read the files directly and judge what claims the D5H no-training representation audit supports.

Context: D5H-Exec no-training representation audit for Fixed-PFA Weak-Target-Preserving Training for FMCW Radar Interference Mitigation.

Primary files to read:
- G:\mineru_output\results\d5h_representation_protocol_audit_executed\D5H_EXECUTED_CONFIG.json
- G:\mineru_output\results\d5h_representation_protocol_audit_executed\D5H_EXECUTED_SUMMARY.md
- G:\mineru_output\results\d5h_representation_protocol_audit_executed\D5H_EXECUTED_DECISION.md
- G:\mineru_output\results\d5h_representation_protocol_audit_executed\D5H_ANALYZE_RESULTS.json
- G:\mineru_output\results\d5h_representation_protocol_audit_executed\D5H_ANALYZE_RESULTS.md
- G:\mineru_output\results\d5h_representation_protocol_audit_executed\EXPERIMENT_AUDIT.json
- G:\mineru_output\results\d5h_representation_protocol_audit_executed\EXPERIMENT_AUDIT.md
- G:\mineru_output\results\d5h_representation_protocol_audit_executed\d5h_phase1_representation_audit.csv
- G:\mineru_output\results\d5h_representation_protocol_audit_executed\d5h_phase0_label_inventory.csv
- G:\mineru_output\results\d5h_representation_protocol_audit_executed\d5h_fixed_pfa_feasibility.csv
- G:\mineru_output\results\d5h_representation_protocol_audit_executed\d5h_saturation_risk.csv

Judge the intended claim:
"D5H-Exec no-training representation audit: judge which representations, if any, are eligible for later minimal model sanity; whether current evidence permits training, weak weighting, or D6; and whether Gao77 label limits force a protocol/data pivot."

Required output fields exactly:
- claim_supported: yes | partial | no
- integrity_status: pass | warn | fail | unavailable
- confidence: high | medium | low
- eligible_representations: [...]
- proxy_only_representations: [...]
- insufficient_label_representations: [...]
- failed_representations: [...]
- should_allow_minimal_model_sanity: true | false
- should_continue_weak_weighting: true | false
- should_enter_D6: true | false
- recommended_next_route: one concise route
- what_results_support: concise
- what_results_do_not_support: concise
- missing_evidence: concise
- suggested_claim_revision: concise

Be conservative. Consider EXPERIMENT_AUDIT integrity_status when setting confidence.
